title: Jammu University Result 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Jammu University Result 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Jammu University Result 2026 Out for Re-Eval Result of B.P.Ed 3rd Semester Exam (Dec-2025) and UG 6th Sem Exams (2019-2025) on the official website - coeju.com on 07-04-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the Jammu University result

content.text: The University of Jammu has officially released the Jammu University Result 2026 for the Re-Evaluation Result of the B.P.Ed 3rd Semester Examination held in December 2025, along with the UG 6th Semester Examination results for sessions 2019, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, and 2025 (Notification No. 125, 100, 139, 36, 13, 19, 45, 72, 36, 34, 31, 33, 57, 189, 188). The results have been declared for both undergraduate and physical education courses under the university's examination system.

Jammu University Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - coeju.com. Students can check and download their results by visiting the official COE Jammu portal and using their login credentials such as roll number and date of birth. The result PDFs and mark sheets are available for download directly from the results/notices section.

Students are advised to carefully verify their personal details, marks, and subject information on the result. In case of any discrepancy or error, candidates should immediately contact the Controller of Examinations, University of Jammu, through the official portal at coeju.com.

The University of Jammu has published the Re-Eval Result of B.P.Ed 3rd Semester and UG 6th Semester results for multiple sessions (2019-2025) on its official website for the 2026 academic session. Students can log in to coeju.com to check and download their provisional results for reference. The results cover a wide range of UG courses including BA, B.Sc., B.Com., BBA, BCA, and the B.P.Ed physical education programme.

rows: Re-Eval Result of B.P.Ed 3rd Semester (Dec-2025) & UG 6th Sem Exams (2019, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025)

content.text: The University of Jammu has activated the direct links to check the latest results for B.P.Ed 3rd Semester Re-Evaluation and UG 6th Semester Examinations across multiple sessions (2019-2025). Students can view or download their results instantly through the official COE portal using the links provided in the table below. All result links redirect directly to the official coeju.com result portal.

links.label: Re-Eval Result of B.P.Ed 3rd Semester Examination Held in Dec-2025
Jammu University COE Official Result / Notices Page

sections.heading: How to Check Jammu University Result 2026

content.text: Follow the step-by-step instructions below to check and download your Jammu University Result 2026 from the official COE portal:

items: Visit the official website of the Controller of Examinations, University of Jammu - coeju.com.
On the homepage, click on the "Results" or "Result Notifications" section.
Look for the relevant result notification - Re-Eval Result of B.P.Ed 3rd Semester (Dec-2025) or UG 6th Sem Notification No. 125, 100, 139... dated 07-04-2026.
Click on the result link to open the PDF notification or the result page.
To download your individual mark sheet, navigate to the UG Semester Marks Sheet section on coeju.com and enter your Roll Number.
View your result, check all details carefully, and download or save the result for future reference.

structured_links.label: Re-Eval Result of B.P.Ed 3rd Semester Examination Held in Dec-2025
Jammu University COE Official Result / Notices Page
